summary: No git tag for v1.4 — plugin-only milestones don't get npm release tags
context: v1.4 Agent Behavior Quality is entirely plugin-side work (behavioral spec, eval harness, plugin tuning). Git tags trigger the GitHub Actions Publish workflow for npm releases.
rationale: Git tags (v1.x.x) are reserved for npm MCP server releases that trigger CI/CD publish. Plugin milestones are internal development milestones that don't correspond to npm version bumps.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Would trigger npm publish workflow for a release with no server changes; confusing version semantics
